nodes.label: Tomorrowland Logo Option B — Source Lattice

properties.mark_concept: Source Lattice — document icon with three connected nodes overlaid, representing linked sources and traceable answers
properties.mark_shape: rounded rectangle container (rx=42) with white document icon (folded corner) and three circles connected by a polyline
text_lines: Search across sources, with every answer traceable
properties.decorative_element: three circles (blue, teal, amber) connected by a line under the tagline, mirroring the mark motif
properties.brand_concept: Knowledge graph / document lattice — sources are nodes; answers are traceable paths through connected documents
